sentences.english: Do you think high school students should have part-time jobs?
Give reasons to support your opinion.
I believe high school students can benefit from having part-time jobs.
sentences.korean: 고등학생이 아르바이트를 하면 도움이 될 수 있다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First it teaches them the value of money.
When you earn your own money you think twice before spending it on unnecessary things.
sentences.korean: 자기 돈을 벌면 불필요한 것에 쓰기 전에 두 번 생각하게 돼요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Book That Changed Your Thinking

sentences.english: Second part-time work develops important life skills like time management and communication.
sentences.korean: 둘째 아르바이트는 시간 관리와 의사소통 같은 중요한 생활 기술을 개발해요.

sentences.english: However it's crucial that the job doesn't interfere with their studies.
sentences.korean: 하지만 일이 공부를 방해하지 않는 것이 중요해요.

sentences.english: I think working around ten hours a week is a good balance between earning experience and maintaining good grades.
sentences.korean: 일주일에 약 10시간 일하는 것이 경험을 쌓으면서 좋은 성적을 유지하는 좋은 균형이라고 생각해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You
